name: ust
description: UST (Universal State Transcript) — specification, conformance vectors, and reference implementations. Trust infrastructure for machine-readable state.

scripts.test:vectors: node packages/ust-protocol/gen-arc-vectors.mjs && git diff --exit-code vectors/arc-vectors.json && node packages/ust-protocol/run-arc-vectors.mjs
scripts.test:spec-sync: node tools/gen-spec-registry.mjs && node tools/gen-readme-version.mjs && node tools/gen-status-svg.mjs && node tools/gen-readme-panels.mjs && git diff --exit-code spec/UST-1.0.md README.md package.json .github/status.svg '.github/ust-*.svg' && node tools/spec-code-sync.mjs
scripts.test:byte-vectors: node packages/ust-protocol/gen-byte-vectors.mjs && git diff --exit-code vectors/checker-byte-vectors.json vectors/checker-security-manifest.json && node packages/ust-protocol/run-byte-vectors.mjs
